description:
Re-creating Neuro-sama, a container of souls of AI waifu / virtual characters to bring them into our worlds.


New Contributors
- @fordelkon made their first contribution in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/pull/1231
⚠️ Critical Bug Fixes
- stage-tamagotchi:
  - Crash on onboarding save by bump electron to v40.8.0, bring back auto-popup - by @sumimakito in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1246 (68bf3)
🚀 Features
- nix:
  - Add FHS devShell for running Electron on NixOS - by @lietblue in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1245 (2b9f5)
- stage-tamagotchi:
  - Add top drag area to move window - by @fordelkon in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1231 (d1189)
  - Add electron main process file logger hook - by @Garfield550, Copilot and RainbowBird in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1247 (92e75)
  - Add top drag area to move window " - by @nekomeowww in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1231 (80b0e)
🐞 Bug Fixes
- pixi-live2d-display:
  - Should ignore items_pinned_to_model.json file - by @nekomeowww (f42c5)
- stage-tamagotchi:
  - Ensure config directory exists - by @nekomeowww (9cee6)
  - Prompt onboarding for stage window only - by @nekomeowww (9c88f)
  - Should handle EADDRINUSE, bug of srvx, robust for server channel restart, injeca fix - by @nekomeowww (a2da0)
  - Forgot to export ServerChannel - by @nekomeowww (0f8ad)
  - Incorrect property - by @nekomeowww (5e075)
- stage-ui:
  - Use lightweight fetch for connectivity check - by @Minnzen in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1238 (eab0f)
View changes on GitHub
